characters.description: A classless spear fighter and Shal's disciple. He begins this volume bound for Dearden, where he must place highly in the regional tournament to protect the standing of the Spear Phantom style.
characters.name: Randidly Ghosthound

characters.description: Randidly's mentor and a senior practitioner of the Spear Phantom tradition. Ether sickness limits him while his pupil enters the Dearden tournament to protect the style's standing.
characters.name: Shal

characters.description: One of four people whose blessed connection to Randidly carries Aether in both directions, helping restore his awareness and strength.
characters.name: Annie

characters.description: One of four people whose blessed connection to Randidly carries Aether in both directions, helping restore his awareness and strength.
characters.name: Sam

characters.description: One of four people whose blessed connection to Randidly carries Aether in both directions, helping restore his awareness and strength.
characters.name: Mrs. Hamilton

characters.description: One of four people whose blessed connection to Randidly carries Aether in both directions, helping restore his awareness and strength.
characters.name: Alana

characters.description: A plant linked to Randidly by a reciprocal Aether connection that strengthens the power available within his inner source.
characters.name: Arbor

characters.description: A plant linked to Randidly by a reciprocal Aether connection that strengthens the power available within his inner source.
characters.name: Thorn

characters.description: A capable member of Randidly's traveling party who plans to visit her family before returning for the tournament. She and Randidly share an attraction neither has resolved.
characters.name: Female spear attendant

characters.description: A spear attendant traveling with Randidly to Dearden. He is still recovering from gray symptoms caused by ether sickness after an earlier attack.
characters.name: Male spear attendant

characters.description: The party's guide to Dearden, familiar with the route and traveling with a private reason for returning to the city.
characters.name: Merchant spear attendant

characters.description: A vice leader in Hart School territory whom Shal urgently seeks. He believes she is connected to the damage done to his family, making her central to his departure from Randidly.
characters.name: Lucretia

characters.description: A blunt, orange-marked qualifier in Randidly's preliminary group who objects to the unequal treatment imposed on entrants without major-style backing.
characters.name: Orange-marked qualifier

characters.description: The powerful female-presenting entity responsible for the golden locks inside Randidly's soul space. It claims to have guided his development and identifies his classless, independent Aether crossroads as the reason for its interest.
characters.name: Golden lock entity

characters.description: A white-haired Artisan-level spear fighter and one of the strongest entrants in the regional tournament. She meets Randidly after his opening victory and presents an immediate measure of the gap between him and the favorites.
characters.name: White-haired contender

characters.description: A red-haired tournament finalist whose devouring energy strips strength from combat images. She concedes a qualifier rematch against Randidly while apparently keeping a stronger option in reserve.
characters.name: Red-haired finalist

characters.description: The red-haired finalist, now identified by her connection to the Devourer. She repeatedly seeks Shal and turns to Randidly when she needs to make an urgent disclosure.
characters.name: Devourer's disciple

characters.description: A heavily built tournament favorite feared by other competitors and widely expected to win. He unexpectedly concedes to Randidly before their scheduled qualifier bout.
characters.name: Tournament favorite

characters.description: A representative of the Engraving Guild who masks the extent of his strength. He demands that Randidly identify the source of his engraved equipment.
characters.name: Engraving Guild representative

characters.description: An elite spear fighter with Crystal Memory, which helps her analyze techniques she witnesses. She recruits Randidly for severe training because she wants him to force the tournament favorite to expose his concealed strength.
characters.name: Northern Region spearwoman

characters.description: The heavily favored spear fighter who dominates a top-sixteen match with experienced Artisan skill. He is expected to meet Randidly in the semifinal.
characters.name: Radiant Dawn contender

characters.description: A senior Steel Feather figure who serves as a tournament commentator. His assessment identifies the leading Radiant Dawn contender as an experienced Artisan with a fully developed combat image.
characters.name: Steel Feather vice leader

characters.description: An envoy from the Central Domain who rebukes Dearden's absent styles and destroys the main hunger swarm mass with an overwhelming fiery spear attack.
characters.name: Central Domain representative

characters.description: A scarred, limping veteran stationed on Dearden's western wall. She explains how hunger swarms drain the surroundings, transform weakened defenders, and expose lower-status spear users to the greatest danger.
characters.name: Veteran wall defender

characters.description: The power that transports Randidly into an ash world after he completes his second Ash path. It begins a dangerous trial that requires him to cross a heated arena toward a crimson-black sphere.
characters.name: Patron of Ash

characters.description: The Steel Feather style's finalist and Randidly's next tournament opponent.
characters.name: Steel Feather finalist

characters.description: An older instructor who knew the founder of the Spear Phantom tradition and witnessed Phantom's Embrace in battle. He warns Randidly that the improvised version used in the tournament could have destroyed his spine.
characters.name: Retired veteran spearman

characters.description: The shade of the Spear Phantom founder who repeatedly defeats Shal within his dream-conflict while Shal resists using the inherited style.
characters.name: Spear Phantom founder's shade

characters.description: The leader of the Central Region Endless Heat Style. After a failed expedition and the death of his nephew, he travels personally toward Dearden in pursuit of Shal and the secret surrounding the Spear Phantom bloodline.
characters.name: Endless Heat master

characters.description: A tournament fighter representing the Breaking Dawn Style stands as Randidly's coming opponent. He is also the Northern Region spearwoman's prospective arranged-marriage counterpart.
characters.name: Breaking Dawn contender

characters.description: An ancient former Earth Golem ruler released from Randidly's soul world when Lucretia opens it in desperation. He emerges carrying a hammer and scepter to oppose the Endless Heat master.
characters.name: Earth Golem warrior

characters.description: A powerful ancestor of the Breaking Dawn contender who appears through an independent projection after the semifinal and tries to seize the incapacitated Randidly.
characters.name: Breaking Dawn projection
